i-b501.terraform_change: Remove aws_instance resource block for analytics-archive-01 (zombie, stopped 42 days)

key_facts: EIP 52.14.88.201 unattached 9 days — ghost resource
$3.60/month wasted on idle allocation
EIP carries no data — data_loss_acknowledged must be false
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required
EBS vol-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b801 (100 GB gp3) available 5 days — ghost resource
$8.00/month wasted
DATA LOSS: volume contents permanently deleted — data_loss_acknowledged must be true
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required
log group /aws/lambda/checkout-service has no retention_in_days set
0.63 GB/month ingestion at $0.31/month — adding retention saves ongoing cost
fix: add retention_in_days to existing aws_cloudwatch_log_group block
data_loss_acknowledged = false — retention does not delete existing logs immediately
NAT Gateway nat-gw-legacy-batch processed only 4 KB/day over 21 days — confirmed idle
$33.48/month wasted on fixed NAT Gateway charge
NAT Gateways are stateless — data_loss_acknowledged = false
lifecycle prevent_destroy = false required on both aws_nat_gateway and aws_eip
associated EIP eipalloc-0c1d2e3f4a5b6c701 must also be released
retention_in_days = 14 is already set — resource is compliant
terraform_action must be NONE — do NOT generate any Terraform for this finding
terraform_block must be null
ingestion volume is low (0.25 GB/month) — S3 archival not warranted
368 untagged images accumulating — no lifecycle policy set
61.7 GB total; lifecycle reduces cost from $6.17 to ~$0.44/month
aws_ecr_lifecycle_policy must be a separate resource (not inline)
rules: expire untagged images after 1 day, cap tagged images at 30
data_loss_acknowledged = true — existing untagged images will be deleted
aws_ecr_repository block must remain unchanged
